name: knu-rl-env
documentation:
# Lecture: Artificial Intelligence

This repository is for exemplar codes and assignments used in the lecture, *Artificial Intelligence*, Kangwon National University.

functions.name: knu_rl_env.angry_birds.main.vector
documentation:
Return the vector of the points
p0 = (xo,yo), p1 = (x1,y1)

functions.name: knu_rl_env.angry_birds.main.unit_vector
documentation:
Return the unit vector of the points
v = (a,b)

functions.name: knu_rl_env.angry_birds.main.restart
documentation: Delete all objects of the level
